text: I just want to know why my favorite show isn't showing up in my account anymore! It makes me so sad. Was there a change?
Hey, my email, you know, like the one I use for logging in, it’s not working? And also, I think I saw something about a new feature? Can you check that? Thanks!

Could you please provide a detailed explanation of the specific differences between the pro and business tiers of your subscription? I want to ensure that I choose the option that best suits my needs.
I didn’t ask for a refund, but I filled out the form for one since I couldn’t get my money back when I should have. Can you help me with this?

Hi there! I hope you’re having a good day. I’ve been trying to log into my account but it keeps saying the password is incorrect. It’s super frustrating because I remember my password clearly. Also, I was wondering if you could tell me the latest updates on my order from last month, just in case that’s affecting anything. Thanks a bunch!
Dear support team, I have a query regarding the functionalities of your latest product. Can you clarify if it is compatible with older versions?

Hello there, I seem to be having a bit of a trouble with my account, it's saying that my password is incorrect, but I’m pretty sure I’m typing it right. I tried resetting it like, 3 times already and nothing seems to work! Can you please check what's going on? Appreciate it!
I've been waiting for my order for over two weeks now. This is really frustrating.
Hey, I ordered some stuff a while back and only got half of it. Can I get my money back for the stuff that didn't show up?
I’m just so upset! I can’t log into my account anymore and I really need to access my stuff. I’ve tried everything! Plzzz help me!

I am really dissatisfied with the service I've been receiving. It’s been such a long wait, and nobody seems to be helping me at all! I feel like my concerns are being ignored, which is frustrating. Please address this issue promptly!

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the recent service I received. I placed an order over a week ago and was assured that it would arrive within 3 to 5 business days. However, it has yet to be delivered, and there has been no communication from your team regarding the delay. This lack of timely updates is quite frustrating, as I had planned around the delivery date. I would appreciate a prompt resolution to this matter.
I thought I was signing up for the monthly plan, but my card just got charged the full year. Can you do something about this? Also, why was the site so slow yesterday?

I recently changed my email address associated with the account, but I also received a notification that my account was flagged for suspicious activity. Can you confirm if my account is secure and if I need to take any further action to regain full access?
I need my money back for that thing I bought. It didn't work at all. Could you help?

I can't believe how frustrating this is, I've been trying to get proper support for my issue which feels like an eternity now, and instead of help, I'm just being tossed around without any real answers. This is definitely not the level of service I expected from such a big company! Like, seriously, why is it so hard to just get someone to understand what I'm talking about? I might as well be talking to a wall. Totally unacceptable.
